description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a dark green exterior and a metallic top. The front features a large, stylized green and yellow logo resembling a leaf or checkmark, accompanied by the text 'pep secret' in a modern, rounded font. The can has a smooth, cylindrical body with a slightly concave bottom and a typical pull-tab opening mechanism on the top. One side displays a white nutrition facts label, indicating it is a commercial drink product. The surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the can appears undamaged and clean. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or vending machines.
description: A glossy, dark green aluminum beverage can with a metallic top, bold logo, and nutrition label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large green and yellow logo and partial 'pep secret' text.
description_view_1: Back-top view highlighting the metallic pull-tab and plain green surface with minimal visible text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutrition facts label and the metallic top.
description_view_3: Side view with the logo visible but text partially obscured, showing the can's curvature.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front features a large green and yellow logo with the text 'pep secret' in a modern, rounded font; nutrition facts label in white on the back.
